alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a saturated seven member heterocycle, with one nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Azepanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a para dioxin moiety, which consists of an unsaturated six-member ring with two oxygen atoms at positions 1 and 4, as well as two CC double bonds.
alternative_parents.name: Para dioxins

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenoids

alternative_parents.description: Organonitrogen compounds containing a quaternary ammonium substituted with four alkyl chains.
alternative_parents.name: Tetraalkylammonium salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a iodine ion.
alternative_parents.name: Organic iodide salts

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds formally derived from ammonia by replacing one, two or three hydrogen atoms by hydrocarbyl groups, and having the general structures RNH2 (primary amines), R2NH (secondary amines), R3N (tertiary amines).
alternative_parents.name: Amines

class.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a benzene ring fused to a dioxane ring. Dioxane a six-member saturated ring of two oxygen atoms and four carbon atoms.
class.name: Benzodioxanes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as benzo-1,4-dioxanes. These are heterocyclic compounds containing a benzene ring fused to a 1,4-dioxane ring.

direct_parent.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a benzene ring fused to a 1,4-dioxane ring.
direct_parent.name: Benzo-1,4-dioxanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a benzene ring fused to a 1,4-dioxane ring.
subclass.name: Benzo-1,4-dioxanes

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
